zh.Mercaston, Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Englan: 英國德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah De Mercaston於1275年4月出生在英國德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓時，她的父親Adam de Newmarche III49歲，母親Joan Bentley49歲。她於大約1273年與William Cokayne在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年在英國英格蘭享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah De Mercaston于1275年4月出生在英国德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓时，她的父亲Adam de Newmarche III49岁，母亲Joan Bentley49岁。她于大约1273年与William Cokayne在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年在英国英格兰享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah De Mercaston was born in April 1275, in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England, her father, Adam de Newmarche III, was 49 and her mother, Joan Bentley, was 49. She married William Cokayne about 1273, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1326, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah De Mercaston est née en avril 1275, à Mercaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Newmarche III, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Joan Bentley, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé William Cokayne environ 1273, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1326, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah De Mercaston im April 1275 in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Newmarche III 49 und ihre Mutter Joan Bentley 49. Sie hat um 1273 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England William Cokayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1326 im Alter von 51 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah De Mercaston è nata il nel aprile 1275 nel Mercaston, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Adam de Newmarche III, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Joan Bentley, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato William Cokayne circa 1273, nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1326, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah De Mercastonが1275年4月にイギリスデルブイシュアイアメルカストンで生まれた時，父Adam de Newmarche IIIは49歳，母Joan Bentleyは49歳であった。約1273年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンでWilliam Cokayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1326年にイギリスイギリスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah De Mercaston(이)가 1275년 4월 영국 더비실르 머카스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Newmarche III(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bentley(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 대략 1273년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 William Cokayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 영국 잉글랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ashbourne Derbyshire England: Ashbourne, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah De Mercaston nasceu em abril de 1275, em Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Newmarche III, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bentley, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com William Cokayne aproximadamente 1273, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1326, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah De Mercaston родилась апрель 1275 г. в местности миркастон, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam de Newmarche III было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bentley, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cokayne около 1273 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1326 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah De Mercaston nació en abril de 1275, en Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Newmarche III, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Joan Bentley, tenía 49 años. Se casó con William Cokayne aproximadamente 1273, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1326, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
